name: loyalty-radar
description: Source-backed loyalty intelligence for points, miles, travel cards, and loyalty ecosystems.

interface.shortDescription: Rank loyalty offers, risks, and ecosystem signals
interface.longDescription: Scan public loyalty sources, cluster repeated evidence, and produce personalized reports for airline, hotel, card, and rental-car programs.
